---
name: "Advaith"
surname: "Velavan"
image: https://github.com/avelavan.png
github: avelavan
info:
  - "I am working on building novel numerical methods to solve mean-field games in a high-dimensional setting with Dr. Dante Kalise."
interests:
  - Numerical analysis
  - ML for Differential Equations
  - Tennis
education:
  - institution: Imperial College London
    location: London, UK
    degree: MSci Mathematics
    startdate: Oct 2020
    enddate: Jun 2025
---

{{< academic-webpage >}}
